title: 1 Top Wall Street Analyst Thinks CRISPR Therapeutics Could More Than Double
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Bull Case Analysis. Analyst Perspective: A top Wall Street analyst maintains that CRISPR Therapeutics stock could more than double from current levels, supported by the company's strong clinical progress and commercial momentum of CASGEVY. Bull Case Drivers: The analyst cites multiple catalysts for upside, including CASGEVY's accelerating commercial adoption, successful clinical data from the in vivo pipeline (CTX310, CTX320), and potential for CAR-T therapies (CTX112, CTX131) to expand into additional indications. CASGEVY Commercial Momentum: With more than 500 people globally having initiated the CASGEVY treatment journey in 2026 and Q1 revenue of $43 million, the therapy is demonstrating meaningful commercial traction. The analyst expects significant acceleration throughout 2026 and beyond. Pipeline Potential: The CTX310 clinical data showing peak reductions of 81% in LDL and 82% in triglycerides in a single dose represents a potential blockbuster therapy. If approved, this could drive substantial revenue growth. Financial Strength: CRISPR's strong cash position exceeding $1.9 billion provides runway for clinical development without immediate near-term financing needs. Valuation Argument: At current levels, the stock may not fully price in the potential value creation from multiple late-stage programs approaching regulatory approval.
